reviews.comment:
Buena  lo si quería pagar con los cupones  del ACA,  y me dijo que pagará con la aplicación de YPF  total tenía mucho vencimiento nosé no me convenció eso en limpieza impecable

(Translated by Google)
Good, I did want to pay with the ACA coupons, and they told me to pay with the YPF app. It had a lot of expiration dates, I don't know, that didn't convince me. Impeccable cleanliness

reviews.comment:
Me decriminaron sali de la fila para ir al baño pedí permiso para volver a la fila , con el carnet de discapacidad y el playero me dijo que tenía que hacer la cola de vuelta y no me cargo nafta  tenia prioridad, no vuelvo más

(Translated by Google)
I was discriminated against. I left the line to go to the bathroom and asked permission to rejoin the line, showing my disability card. The attendant told me I had to wait in line again and wouldn't fill my tank, even though I had priority. I'm never going back.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3398041021459195715/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURia3BmWXZRRRAB
